analysis: EUR/USD is pushing up on the 4-hour, 49% conviction. But the Daily bias is against it — no trade until they line up. Volatility is quiet — coiled and choppy. Nearest structure: ceiling (19.0 pips away). A firm dollar (+0.02% DXY) is a headwind to the read.
